title: AI Engineer
description:
**Job Title:** GenAI / LLM Solution Architect (RAG \+ Agents) – Python/FastAPI  
**Job Type:** Remote  
**Experience Required:** 5\+ Years (Minimum)  
**Salary:** Negotiable (Immediate Joiners Only)  
**No. of Vacancies:** 01  
**Company Name:** Whiz IT Services Pvt. Ltd.  
**Location:** 91Springboard, Sky Loft, CREATICITY MALL, Opposite Golf Course, Off Airport Road, Shastrinagar, Yerawada, Pune, Maharashtra 411006

**JOB SUMMARY**

We are looking for a highly skilled **GenAI / LLM Solution Architect** who can own the **end\-to\-end architecture and delivery** of enterprise\-grade GenAI solutions. The role involves designing and building **RAG pipelines**, deploying **agentic AI workflows**, developing **production\-ready APIs** using **Python \+ FastAPI**, and integrating with enterprise systems and APIs while ensuring strong **safety**, **evaluation**, and **observability** practices.

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES1\) End\-to\-End GenAI Architecture \& Delivery**

* Own the complete GenAI lifecycle: **requirements → solution design → implementation → deployment**
* Drive **model selection**, **prompt strategy**, **safety/guardrails**, **evaluation**, and **enterprise integrations**
* Ensure solutions meet enterprise standards for **security**, **performance**, **scalability**, and **reliability**

**2\) RAG Pipeline Design \& Optimization**

* Design and optimize **Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG)** pipelines including:
* **Chunking strategy**
* **Embedding model selection**
* **Hybrid retrieval (BM25 \+ Vector Search)**
* **Re\-ranking**
* **Context window management**
* **Citation grounding**
* **Hallucination mitigation using prompt patterns**
* Improve accuracy using **evaluation frameworks** and continuous iteration

**3\) Production API Development (Python \+ FastAPI)**

* Build and debug scalable APIs using **Python \+ FastAPI**
* Integrate workflows using **LangChain / LangGraph** (tools, routers, memory, state machines)
* Implement:
* **Async execution**
* **Structured outputs (JSON Schema)**
* **Retries / timeouts**
* **Observability (logs, metrics, traces)**

**4\) Agentic AI Workflow Implementation**

* Design and implement **Agentic AI systems**, including:
* **Planner–executor / reflection loops**
* **Tool orchestration**
* **Multi\-step reasoning flows (ReAct / function\-calling)**
* **Failure recovery**
* **Human\-in\-the\-loop checkpoints**
* **Policy\-based decision gating**

**5\) Vector Database Engineering**

* Work with vector databases and search systems including **Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, FAISS, Azure AI Search vectors**
* Handle:
* **Schema/index design (HNSW / IVF)**
* **Metadata filtering**
* **Namespace partitioning**
* **Similarity tuning**
* **Ingestion pipelines**
* **Latency vs recall trade\-offs**

**6\) Containerization \& Deployment Readiness**

* Containerize services using **Docker**
* Build production\-grade deployments with:
* **Multi\-stage Docker builds**
* **Dependency pinning**
* **Environment configuration**
* **Non\-root runtime**
* **Health checks**
* **CI/CD readiness**

**MUST HAVE SKILLS**

* Strong experience in **GenAI / LLM solution architecture and delivery**
* Hands\-on expertise in **RAG pipelines** (**chunking, embeddings, hybrid retrieval, re\-ranking**)
* Strong backend development skills in **Python \+ FastAPI**
* Experience with **LangChain / LangGraph** and workflow orchestration
* Implementation experience with **agentic AI patterns** (**ReAct, tool calling, planner\-executor, reflection**)
* Strong understanding of **vector databases and indexing (HNSW/IVF)** and retrieval tuning
* Experience with **Docker** and production deployment best practices
* Strong troubleshooting skills for **latency, accuracy, hallucinations, and stability**
* Knowledge of **observability** (**logging, metrics, tracing**) and production monitoring

**GOOD TO HAVE**

* Experience with **Azure / AWS / GCP** GenAI deployments
* Familiarity with **LLM evaluation frameworks** and automated testing for GenAI outputs
* Experience with enterprise **authentication/authorization**, **role\-based access**, and compliance needs
* Exposure to **CI/CD pipelines**, **Kubernetes**, or scalable deployment environments

**WHO SHOULD APPLY**

* Candidates who can work independently with strong **solution ownership and delivery**
* Engineers who can balance **architecture \+ hands\-on development**
* Professionals focused on **production readiness**, **safety**, and **reliability**

Job Types: Full\-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹10,000\.00 \- ₹100,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Experience:

* total: 5 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.
  
  

Meet the Team
  
  

At Cisco, AI isn’t just a technology—it’s a movement. Our AI teams are shaping the future by embedding intelligence into collaboration, networking, security, observability, and beyond. Our teams focus on building next\-generation businesses powered by AI. We are a forward\-thinking team of engineers, researchers, and innovators working at the intersection of deep learning, generative AI, and cutting\-edge product design. The vibe is fast\-paced, entrepreneurial, and collaborative, where every day offers the opportunity to create meaningful solutions with massive global impact.
  
Your Impact
  
As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will be at the forefront of Cisco’s generative AI strategy. You will design, train, and optimize large language models (LLMs) and multimodal AI systems to address ambitious real\-world challenges across industries. You will drive innovation by developing scalable, high\-performing AI solutions, collaborating across engineering and product teams, and guiding research into emerging technologies. Success in this role means delivering impactful AI capabilities that transform Cisco’s products and customer experiences while mentoring peers and evangelizing AI innovation both inside and outside the company.
  
  

Minimum Qualifications
  
  

* Students graduating in 2027
* Programming experience with Java, C\+\+, Python, or related languages
* Hands\-on experience in natural language processing, computer vision, or multimodal interaction.
* Experience using deep learning frameworks to train, fine\-tune, and optimize GenAI models for performance and scalability.
* Experience designing and deploying proof\-of\-concepts and production\-ready AI systems.


Preferred Qualifications
  
  

* Strong background in system design, software development, and production deployment at scale.
* Ability to transform ambiguous requirements into actionable deep learning solutions.
* Familiarity with state\-of\-the\-art models and methods (e.g., CLIP, DALLE 2, diffusion models).
* Demonstrated contributions to the AI/ML community through top\-tier publications, open\-source projects, or leaderboard competitions.


Why Cisco?
  
  

At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
  
Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
  
We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: Lead Consultant - AI Application Engineering
description:
**Job Title: Lead Consultant \- AI Application Engineering**
------------------------------------------------------------

**Career Level:** E

**Introduction to role:**
-------------------------


Are you ready to turn modern AI into reliable, scalable applications that help accelerate the discovery and delivery of life\-changing medicines? Do you thrive at the intersection of hands\-on engineering, GenAI, and product leadership—translating ideas into tools that scientists and business teams use every day?


In this role, you will lead full\-stack delivery of AI\-enabled products from architecture to production, applying modern engineering practices to unlock data, automate decisions, and create seamless user experiences. You will guide multi\-functional squads, shape technical direction, and ship secure, high\-quality solutions that scale across a global enterprise. With strong sponsorship and access to sophisticated platforms, you will set the pace for how AI is designed, built, and adopted.

**Accountabilities:**
---------------------

* Product Architecture and Strategy: Define technical direction for AI applications, making pragmatic build\-versus\-buy choices and aligning roadmaps to measurable business outcomes.
* Full\-Stack Delivery: Lead end\-to\-end engineering across front\-end, back\-end, APIs, data layers, and infrastructure to deliver resilient, observable, and secure applications.
* Machine Learning Pipelines: Operationalize models with robust data ingestion, feature stores, evaluation, and monitoring to ensure accuracy, reliability, and drift management.
* Generative AI Integration: Apply LLMs and related techniques (prompting, fine\-tuning, retrieval) to create new user experiences and automate knowledge\-heavy workflows responsibly.
* Scalable Systems: Design for performance and elasticity, optimizing cost and latency while ensuring compliance, privacy, and safe use of AI.
* Collaboration and Leadership: Partner with data scientists, product managers, and domain experts to frame problems, test hypotheses, and iterate quickly from prototype to production.
* Engineering Excellence: Uphold code quality, patterns, and standards; establish CI/CD, testing strategies, and documentation that make solutions maintainable and auditable.
* Innovation and Tech Evaluation: Maintain a clear tech radar; pilot emerging tools and methodologies and scale what works to raise engineering throughput and product impact.
* Operability and Reliability: Ensure robust SLOs, on\-call readiness, telemetry, and incident playbooks so applications remain dependable at enterprise scale.
* Capability Building: Mentor engineers, grow skills in AI application engineering, and develop a culture of curiosity, perseverance, and high performance.

**Essential Skills/Experience:**
--------------------------------

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
* Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer with a focus on AI and machine learning applications.
* Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python, JavaScript, or Node.js.
* Experience with frontend frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js and backend technologies including RESTful APIs, Django, or Flask.
* Expertise in machine learning frameworks like PyTorch or Scikit\-learn.
* Good experience with Generative AI models and techniques, such as GANs or transformers.
* Good experience with OpenAI, bedrock models, cognitive services etc.
* Experience with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, specifically in deploying AI/ML applications.
* Strong understanding of databases such as SQL, NoSQL, and data warehousing solutions like Snowflake.
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and the ability to work in a fast\-paced, collaborative environment.
* Experience with DevOps practices and tools for continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD).
* Knowledge of microservices architectures and containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Familiarity with version control systems such as Git etc.
* Establish and make sure development standards, security protocols, and compliance requirements across custom engineering projects.
* Conduct regular code reviews, performance evaluations, and audits to ensure the integrity and reliability of delivered solutions.
* Collaborate with IT governance teams to ensure alignment to interpersonal policies and standards.

**Desirable Skills/Experience:**
--------------------------------

* Experience in enterprise\-level integrations and data engineering projects.
* Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI


When we put unexpected teams in the same room, we unleash ambitious thinking with the power to inspire life\-changing medicines. In\-person working gives us the platform we need to connect, work at pace and challenge perceptions. That's why we work, on average, a minimum of three days per week from the office. But that doesn't mean we're not flexible. We balance the expectation of being in the office while respecting individual flexibility. Join us in our unique and ambitious world.

**Why AstraZeneca:**
--------------------


Here, engineering talent meets scientific purpose. You will work with advanced platforms, real\-world data, and ambitious collaborators to deliver AI capabilities that tangibly speed research, sharpen decision\-making, and expand access for patients. Backed by meaningful investment and a bold digital vision, we pair high standards with freedom to experiment—think hackathons, rapid pilots, and scaling what works—so you can build, learn, and lead. We value kindness alongside ambition, encourage transparent debate, and bring diverse expertise together to solve problems that matter at global scale.

**Call to Action:**
-------------------


Lead the next wave of AI application engineering that moves medicines to patients faster—submit your application and start creating impact this quarter.

title: Global Data Analyst Senior Specialist
description:
Who We Are


Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963\. Today, we help clients with total transformation\-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom\-line impact.  

  

To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading\-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive.

  

What You'll Do


Be part of a team that is transforming BCG into an AI\-first company! We are building a centralized Business Intelligence \& Analytics function that will simplify and automate information delivery—providing advanced insights and analysis to support decision\-making. To date, the team has launched and operationalized several global\-scale products and dashboards, enhancing how our leaders engage in information to manage the business. With AI, the next wave of digital reporting is underway which will help to unlock further value for BCG’s leadership and functions with best\-in\-class business intelligence and analytics.

  

As a Global Product Senior Specialist AI, you’ll play a key role in identifying, evaluating, and optimizing how BCG teams apply AI within their work. You’ll partner closely with business stakeholders, product owners, and AI engineers to evaluate use cases, design optimal prompting strategies, and measure agent performance. Your focus will be on ensuring that every AI use case is impactful, efficient, and aligned with BCG’s standards for quality, security, and business value.

 **Key Responsibilities**

 **1\. Use Case Evaluation \& Enablement**

* Partner with business and product teams to identify and assess potential AI use cases.
* Evaluate feasibility, value potential, and alignment with strategic priorities.
* Translate business workflows into structured AI\-enabled opportunities.
* Create documentation and recommendations that guide prioritization and implementation.

**2\. Prompting \& Agent Performance Optimization**

* Collaborate with technical teams to design, test, and refine prompting strategies for large language models (LLMs) and AI agents.
* Develop evaluation frameworks for accuracy, response quality, and consistency across use cases.
* Define and manage metrics and benchmarks to assess model and agent performance. • Analyze results to identify optimization opportunities and best practices for reuse across teams.
* Support deployment of prompting templates and playbooks for common BCG business tasks.

**3\. Cross\-Team Collaboration \& AI Product Support**

* Partner with Data Engineers and Product Analysts to operationalize validated use cases and integrate optimized prompts into production systems.
* Provide feedback loops between users, analysts, and technical teams to continuously improve agent performance.
* Contribute to documentation, training materials, and enablement sessions to scale GenAI adoption across teams.

**4\. Evaluation, Governance \& Reporting**

* Implement quality assurance standards, evaluation guardrails, and bias mitigation techniques for AI workflows.
* Track adoption and usage metrics to measure business impact.
* Produce insights and recommendations that inform continuous improvement cycles.
* Maintain up\-to\-date documentation of evaluation results, prompting strategies, and learnings.

  

What You'll Bring

**Technical \& Analytical Skills**

* 5–8 years of experience in analytics, AI product evaluation, or data\-driven business enablement.
* Deep understanding of Generative AI, LLM capabilities, and prompt engineering principles.
* Proficiency in analyzing model outputs and designing frameworks to evaluate accuracy and utility.
* Working familiarity with AI tools and libraries (LangChain, LlamaIndex, HuggingFace, OpenAI APIs, Anthropic Claude, etc.).
* Basic Python knowledge for experimentation, data analysis, or building prompt evaluation scripts.
* Strong SQL and data fluency to support analysis and insight generation.
* Experience working with business data, dashboards, or measurement frameworks.

**Collaboration \& Communication Skills**

* Ability to bridge technical AI concepts and business needs clearly and effectively.
* Experience facilitating workshops or discussions around AI use\-case design and performance evaluation.
* Strong analytical storytelling and structured problem\-solving skills.
* Comfort working with cross\-functional global teams in fast\-paced, iterative environments.
* A mindset of curiosity, accountability, and continuous learning in applied AI.

  

Who You'll Work With


As part of BI\&A Enablement, you’ll collaborate with product managers, data engineers, and business teams across BCG. Together, you’ll evaluate AI opportunities, optimize LLM\-powered solutions, and build the frameworks that enable responsible, effective AI adoption firmwide.

  

Additional info

**Example Deliverables**

* AI driven products and guiding their architecture
* Prompt and agent performance evaluations
* Prompt optimization playbooks and reusable templates
* Model evaluation dashboards \& quality scoring tools
* Business impact and adoption measurement reports

  

Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.
  

BCG is an E \- Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E\-Verify.

We’re Even More Excited If You Have::

Thrive at BlackLine Because You Are Joining::

title: Senior QA Automation Engineer
description:
**What makes us Qlik?**

A Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ Leader for 15 years in a row, Qlik transforms complex data landscapes into actionable insights, driving strategic business outcomes. Serving over 40,000 global customers, our portfolio leverages pervasive data quality and advanced AI/ML capabilities that lead to better decisions, faster.

We excel in integration and governance solutions that work with diverse data sources, and our real\-time analytics uncover hidden patterns, empowering teams to address complex challenges and seize new opportunities.
**The Senior QA Automation Engineer Role**

Qlik is seeking a highly skilled Senior Automation QA Engineer to design and implement intelligent test automation solutions for our Salesforce and NetSuite platforms. This role blends advanced scripting skills with hands\-on experience in no\-code automation tools like ACCELQ or Qualitia and explores the use of AI agents to enhance test case generation and maintenance.

You’ll play a key role in ensuring quality and consistency in mission\-critical business applications while helping evolve Qlik’s QA function through smart automation and AI\-driven testing strategies.
**What makes this role interesting?*** Act as an individual contributor to design, develop, and maintain automated test suites for Salesforce and NetSuite using both code\-based and no\-code tools like Qualitia and/or ACCELQ.
* Drive in\-sprint automation to reduce manual test efforts, accelerate execution, and ensure high\-quality, timely deliveries within Agile cycles.
* Created or Leveraged AI/LLM agents to auto\-generate test scripts, optimize regression coverage, and support test impact analysis.
* Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Gearset); troubleshoot failures and manage test data for quality releases.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define test scope, perform risk analysis, and align testing with business goals and Agile planning.
* Develop test cases, traceability matrices, and robust automation packs to ensure comprehensive coverage and efficient execution.
* Monitor and report on test coverage, automation effectiveness through metrics, and defects; ensure clear documentation and reproducible defect logs.
* Research and apply emerging AI/GenAI\-driven QA tools to improve automation efficiency and quality.
* Maintain test environments and tools to ensure optimal stability and performance.
* Champion continuous improvement and escalate quality concerns promptly and collaboratively.

**We’re looking for a teammate with:**
* 5\+ years of hands\-on experience in QA automation with both script\-based tools (e.g., Selenium, Python) and no\-code platforms such as ACCELQ and/or Qualitia.
* Strong domain knowledge of Salesforce (Apex, Lightning) and NetSuite (SuiteScript, workflows, or saved searches).
* Experience implementing and managing test automation frameworks for enterprise platforms like Salesforce and NetSuite, developing end\-to\-end test automation scripts involving multiple complex systems to attain seamless experience for customers using the process/product.
* Familiarity with AI agents (e.g., OpenAI, LangChain) and how they can support testing, such as script generation, test optimization, and smart validation.
* Strong understanding of QA best practices, test planning, and Agile methodologies.
* Proficiency with version control systems (e.g., Git), CI/CD pipelines, and test management tools (e.g., Jira, Zephyr).
* Certifications in Salesforce or NetSuite platforms (e.g., Salesforce Platform Developer, NetSuite ERP Consultant).
* Exposure to prompt engineering or building/testing GenAI\-powered features.
* Experience with performance testing, load testing (JMeter), or security testing frameworks.
* Passion for delivering high\-quality products and excellent customer satisfaction.
* Proactive team player with strong collaboration and communication skills across departments.
* Strong critical thinking and analytical abilities to simplify complex issues and develop effective solutions.
* Solid understanding of the Test Life Cycle and Agile/Scrum methodologies, with hands\-on experience in test design and execution.
* Able to manage tasks independently, prioritize effectively, and adapt in a fast\-paced environment.
* Detail\-oriented with strong problem\-solving skills and the ability to handle multiple priorities efficiently.


**The location for this role is:**
Bangalore, India **Apply now and help change how the world transforms complex data landscapes into actionable insights and turns complex data challenges into new opportunities!****More about Qlik and who we are:**

Find out more about life at Qlik on social: Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, and X/Twitter, and to see all other opportunities to join us and our values, check out our Careers Page.

What else do we offer?
* Genuine career progression pathways and mentoring programs
* Culture of innovation, technology, collaboration, and openness
* Flexible, diverse, and international work environment



Giving back is a huge part of our culture. Alongside an extra “change the world” day plus another for personal development, we also highly encourage participation in our Corporate Responsibility Employee Programs
***If you need assistance applying for a role due to a disability, please submit your request via email to accessibilityta @ qlik.com******.*** ***Any information you provide will be treated according to Qlik’s*** ***Recruitment Privacy Notice******. Qlik may only respond to emails related to accommodation requests.***

description:
You’re not the person who will settle for just any role. Neither are we. Because we’re out to create Better Care for a Better World, and that takes a certain kind of person and teams who care about making a difference. Here, you’ll bring your professional expertise, talent, and drive to building and managing our portfolio of iconic, ground\-breaking brands. In this role, you’ll help us deliver better care for billions of people around the world. It starts with YOU.


In this role, you will:

* Develop and design IT infrastructure to support core business processes, ensuring scalability and performance using computing platforms such as Amazon Web Services and Microsoft Azure.
* Utilize Agile Methodology to plan and deliver platform\-specific solutions that address complex business requirements and foster innovation.
* Lead architectural design initiatives involving microservices, middleware, and application programming interfaces (API) to enhance system integration and compatibility.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with developers and stakeholders for optimizing software development and engineering practices, incorporating solutions that involve cloud architectures and machine learning.

You perform at the highest level possible, and you appreciate a performance culture fueled by authentic caring. Key Qualifications and Experiences:

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

* Proficient in Python and frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, LangGraph etc.
* Strong experience in training and/or fine\-tuning foundation models and integrating them into production pipelines.
* Proven experience in designing and deploying scalable APIs and microservices using FastAPI or Flask.

* Hands\-on experience with CI/CD, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and cloud\-based AI infrastructure (Azure \[preferred], AWS, or GCP).
* Deep understanding of prompt engineering, model evaluation, observability, and responsible AI.
* Experience with large\-scale data processing and distributed computing.
* Experience with reinforcement learning and/or unsupervised learning.
* Experience with natural language generation and/or image generation.
* Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience leading technical teams or AI initiatives end\-to\-end.
* Exposure to multimodal GenAI (e.g., image, audio, and video generation).
* Familiarity with enterprise\-grade data governance and AI risk frameworks.
* Contributions to open\-source GenAI/ML projects or research publications.

title: Senior Generative AI Engineer
description:
You’re not the person who will settle for just any role. Neither are we. Because we’re out to create Better Care for a Better World, and that takes a certain kind of person and teams who care about making a difference. Here, you’ll bring your professional expertise, talent, and drive to building and managing our portfolio of iconic, ground\-breaking brands. In this role, you’ll help us deliver better care for billions of people around the world. It starts with YOU.


In this role, you will:

* Lead the architecture and development of scalable GenAI solutions including LLMs, multimodal models, retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG) systems and AI Agents.
* Evaluate and select appropriate foundation models (open\-source or commercial) based on business needs and constraints.
* Fine\-tune and optimize large language models (LLMs) using techniques like prompt engineering, LoRA, PEFT, reinforcement learning (RLHF), and transfer learning.
* Drive innovation through experimentation with GANs, VAEs, diffusion models, and transformer\-based architectures.
* Implement robust LLMOps practices for model lifecycle management, versioning, evaluation, and rollback strategies.
* Lead model deployment using cloud\-native tools (Azure \[preferred], AWS, GCP) and MLOps platforms (e.g Databricks).
* Develop and Enhance features for AI observability including hallucination detection, prompt drift monitoring, and output explainability etc.
* Champion responsible AI practices, ensuring compliance with privacy, security, and fairness standards.
* Act as a technical mentor and thought leader within the AI/ML engineering team.
* Work closely with business and product stakeholders to translate ambiguous problems into AI\-driven solutions.
* Stay abreast of the latest advancements in GenAI, LLMs, and deep learning research.
* Publish internal research, prototype new capabilities, and drive knowledge sharing across teams.

**About Us**


Huggies®. Kleenex®. Cottonelle®. Scott®. Kotex®. Poise®. Depend®. Kimberly\-Clark Professional®. You already know our legendary brands—and so does the rest of the world. In fact, millions of people use Kimberly\-Clark products every day. We know these amazing Kimberly\-Clark products wouldn’t exist without talented professionals, like you.


At Kimberly\-Clark, you’ll be part of the best team committed to driving innovation, growth and impact. We’re founded on more than 150 years of market leadership, and we’re always looking for new and better ways to perform – so there’s your open door of opportunity. It’s all here for you at Kimberly\-Clark.

**Led by Purpose. Driven by You**

**About You**


You perform at the highest level possible, and you appreciate a performance culture fueled by authentic caring. You want to be part of a company actively dedicated to sustainability, inclusion, wellbeing, and career development. You love what you do, especially when the work you do makes a difference. At Kimberly\-Clark, we’re constantly exploring new ideas on how, when, and where we can best achieve results. When you join our team, you’ll experience Flex That Works: flexible work arrangements that empower you to have purposeful time in the office and partner with your leader to make flexibility work for both you and the business.


In one of our technical roles, you’ll focus on winning with consumers and the market, while putting safety, mutual respect, and human dignity at the center. To succeed in this role, you will need the following qualifications:


Key Qualifications and Experiences:

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* 6\+ years of experience in machine learning, deep learning, or NLP, with 2\+ years in GenAI/LLM development.
* Proficient in Python and frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, LangGraph etc.
* Strong experience in training and/or fine\-tuning foundation models and integrating them into production pipelines.
* Proven experience in designing and deploying scalable APIs and microservices using FastAPI or Flask.
* Familiarity with vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate), embeddings, and semantic search.
* Hands\-on experience with CI/CD, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and cloud\-based AI infrastructure (Azure \[preferred], AWS, or GCP).
* Deep understanding of prompt engineering, model evaluation, observability, and responsible AI.
* Experience with large\-scale data processing and distributed computing.
* Experience with reinforcement learning and/or unsupervised learning.
* Experience with natural language generation and/or image generation.
* Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience leading technical teams or AI initiatives end\-to\-end.
* Exposure to multimodal GenAI (e.g., image, audio, and video generation).
* Familiarity with enterprise\-grade data governance and AI risk frameworks.
* Contributions to open\-source GenAI/ML projects or research publications.

**To Be Considered**  

Click the Apply button and complete the online application process. A member of our recruiting team will review your application and follow up if you seem like a great fit for this role.


In the meantime, please check out the careers website.

**And finally, the fine print….**

*For Kimberly\-Clark to grow and prosper, we must be an inclusive organization that applies the diverse experiences and passions of its team members to brands that make life better for people all around the world. We actively seek to build a workforce that reflects the experiences of our consumers. When you bring your original thinking to Kimberly\-Clark, you fuel the continued success of our enterprise. title: Senior Strategist, Trust and Safety, Discovery, Search
description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Bengaluru, Karnataka, India**.### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 4 years of experience in data analytics, Trust and Safety, policy, cybersecurity, or a related field.
* 4 years of experience in data analysis, working with databases, and querying (e.g., SQL, MySQL).

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree in a related field.
* Experience in SQL, building dashboards, data collection/transformation, visualization/dashboards, or with programming language (e.g., Python).
* Experience in working with abuse, spam, fraud or malware.
* Experience with machine learning.
* Experience in generating summary statistics, and developing insights from quantitative and qualitative data.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills, with the ability to collaborate cross\-functionally.

**About the job**
-----------------


Trust \& Safety team members are tasked with identifying and taking on the biggest problems that challenge the safety and integrity of our products. They use technical know\-how, excellent problem\-solving skills, user insights, and proactive communication to protect users and our partners from abuse across Google products like Search, Maps, Gmail, and Google Ads. On this team, you're a big\-picture thinker and strategic team\-player with a passion for doing what’s right. You work globally and cross\-functionally with Google engineers and product managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed \- with urgency. And you take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.
  

  

In this role, you will have the opportunity to shape the future of people discovering information through Google Search with user and business impact.**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Use technical judgment to drive project delivery, test proposals and identify risks. Manage multiple projects, manage cross\-functional teams.
* Collaborate with other teams and functions (e.g., Engineering, Product Managers, Legal, Policy).
* Perform data analysis to provide insights that help to identify and fight abuse across the products.
* Lead and manage cross\-functional, multi\- quarter technical trust projects (e.g., application of Generative AI (GenAI) frameworks like agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI), Large Language Model (LLM)). Analyze and debug escalations and identify trends that can indicate product risks.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
description:
**About the Team:**
-------------------


Rubrik is building the world’s first cloud data management platform for data protection, search, analytics, archival and copy data management for hybrid cloud enterprises. Recover, manage, and secure your data on any platform which makes it very easy for all businesses to manage their data. Our goal is to democratize public cloud for every enterprise and provide them with the architecture to manage data at scale. With our massive undertaking, there is a lot of opportunity for personal growth and contribution to a product unlike anything built before.


We are today the Fastest growing Enterprise Startup ever in the history of Silicon Valley!


**About the role:**
-------------------


The **Data Platform Engineer** is responsible for designing and enforcing data platform architecture and modeling standards, enabling analytics, conversational analytics, and AI\-driven use cases across the enterprise. The role supports platform level POCs, including data ingestion frameworks, and leverage AI capabilities to process unstructured \& structured data. The Data Platform Engineer defines and governs data modeling and data management standards, enforces enterprise data governance frameworks, and partners closely with architect, data engineers, and analysts teams to support both traditional BI and emerging AI/GenAI workloads.


**What you'll do:**
-------------------


### **Data Modeling \& Analytics Enablement**


* Develop and maintain logical, and physical data models to support enterprise analytics and AI/Gen AI use cases.
* Design data models that enable:
* + BI and reporting
	+ Forecasting and predictive models
	+ Feature engineering for ML models
	+ GenAI workloads
* Collaborate with data engineering teams to implement data transformations, pipelines and orchestration using **dbt, SQL** and integrate them into DevOps workflows and CI/CD pipelines
* Enable and optimize analytics platforms such as Snowflake (or equivalent) and Tableau (or equivalent) for both traditional and AI\-driven workloads
* Ensure data models and transformations adhere to enterprise governance, standards, and best practices, supporting scalable and reliable analytics.


### **Data Integration \& Processing**


* Define ingestion and transformation patterns for batch, streaming, and near real\-time data.
* Implement ETL/ELT processes using tools such as FiveTran, dbt, SQL, and Snowflake pipelines to ensure high quality, reliable, and scalable data flows.
* Enable real time and batch processing capabilities to support analytics, AI, and GenAI workloads.
* Collaborate with data engineers, platform architects, and analytics teams to standardize ingestion patterns, maintain metadata, and ensure governance compliance
* Optimize pipelines for performance, cost efficiency, and scalability, including monitoring, alerting, and automated recovery mechanisms.


### **Platform POCs \& AI\-Driven Data Enablement**


* + Lead POCs on the data platform to evaluate and demonstrate emerging capabilities for analytics, AI, and GenAI workloads.
	+ Implement unstructured\-to\-structured data processing pipelines using AI/ML techniques to extract, transform, and enrich data for downstream consumption.
	+ Design and execute data scoring, feature generation, and enrichment processes to support predictive analytics, ML models, and GenAI applications.
	+ Leverage Snowflake Cortex and other platform tools to prototype scalable, high performance data workflows.
	+ Manage and maintain the data platform, including schema evolution, performance optimization, and platform monitoring
	+ Collaborate with platform, data engineering, and analytics teams to transition successful POCs into production ready solutions, ensuring alignment with governance, architecture, and platform standards.

**Experience you'll need:**
---------------------------


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Management, Information Systems, or related field.
* 8–10\+ years of experience in Platform Engineering, Data Engineering and Modeling including hands on experience with enterprise scale platforms and analytics enablement
* Strong skills in conceptual, logical, and physical data modeling, including dimensional modeling, canonical models, and support for BI, predictive analytics, and AI/GenAI workloads.
* Modern data platforms \& tools
	+ Snowflake or equivalent cloud warehouse
	+ dbt for data transformation and modeling
	+ Tableau or other equivalent visualization/reporting tools
* Advanced SQL, with experience in Python or other scripting languages for data processing and AI/ML workflows.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Experience working with feature engineering, predictive modeling, or unstructured\-to\-structured data processing for AI/ML or GenAI use cases is a plus.
* Proven ability to work closely with platform architect, data engineers and analysts teams to deliver scalable, governed, and production ready data solutions

**Join Us in Securing the World's Data**
----------------------------------------


Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real\-time guardrails, fine\-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.

  


**Inclusion @ Rubrik**
----------------------


At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.


Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.


### **Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:**


* Our Company: We are committed to building a merit\-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.
* Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.
* Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.

**Equal Opportunity Employer/Veterans/Disabled**
------------------------------------------------


Rubrik is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or protected veteran status and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability.


Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.


Federal law requires employers to provide reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please contact us at hr@rubrik.com if you require a reasonable accommodation to apply for a job or to perform your job. Examples of reasonable accommodation include making a change to the application process or work procedures, providing documents in an alternate format, using a sign language interpreter, or using specialized equipment.

**Job Title: Digital Engineering Architect**

**Role Overview**



The Digital Engineering Architect (Development\-Led) is a hands\-on technical leader responsible for designing and building modern digital solutions while defining the engineering architecture, development standards, and DevOps practices. This role places software development at the core, with architecture and automation used to accelerate delivery, quality, and scalability across digital platforms.


**Key Responsibilities**



Software Development


* Lead hands\-on development of complex, business\-critical digital systems.


* Design and implement clean, maintainable, and testable code across services and platforms.


* Set coding standards, design patterns, and development best practices.


* Guide teams in applying DDD, SOLID principles, and modern engineering patterns.


* Perform code reviews and mentor engineers to raise overall development quality.


* Balance short\-term delivery needs with long\-term architectural health.Digital \& Cloud Architecture


* Design end\-to\-end application architectures aligned with product and business goals.


* Build cloud\-native solutions using microservices, APIs, containers, and event\-driven patterns.


* Lead modernization of legacy applications into scalable, cloud\-ready systems.


* Define reference architectures and reusable components.DevOps / DevSecOps Enablement


* Architect and implement CI/CD pipelines integrated with automated testing and security checks.


* Drive Infrastructure as Code adoption and environment automation.


* Embed DevSecOps practices into the development lifecycle.


* Improve developer experience through tooling, automation, and self\-service capabilities.


* Collaborate with operations/SRE teams to ensure smooth production deployments. GenAI Enablement


* Enable practical GenAI use cases such as developer productivity tools or intelligent features.


* Provide guidance on safe and compliant integration of GenAI APIs.


* Ensure GenAI usage aligns with engineering and security standards. Leadership \& Collaboration


* Act as a hands\-on technical leader within delivery teams.


* Collaborate closely with product managers and business stakeholders.


* Mentor engineers and emerging technical leaders.


* Contribute to engineering roadmaps and technology strategy.

  


**Required Qualifications**


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.


* Strong hands\-on coding expertise in one or more modern languages (Java, .NET, Python, Node.js, etc.).


* Proven experience building cloud\-native applications on AWS, Azure, or GCP.


* Solid experience with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and automation.


* Deep understanding of distributed systems and API design.


* Strong foundation in application security and secure coding practices.


* Excellent communication and technical leadership skills.

  


**Preferred Qualifications**


* Experience leading development of large\-scale or mission\-critical systems.


* Hands\-on experience with Kubernetes and container platforms.


* Background in platform engineering or internal developer platforms.


* Familiarity with observability and SRE practices.


* Cloud, DevOps, or architecture certifications.



Key Competencies
* Hands\-on software development leadership


* Architecture driven by real delivery experience


* Automation and DevOps mindset


* Code quality and engineering excellence


* Pragmatic, business\-aligned decision making

title: Data Analytics Engineer - Sr Analyst
description:
**Data Analytics Engineer** **– CL3**

**Role Overview****:** As *a Data Analytics Engineer*, you will actively engage in your engineering craft, taking a hands\-on approach to multiple high\-visibility projects. Your expertise will be pivotal in delivering solutions that delight customers and users, while also driving tangible value for Deloitte's business investments. You will leverage your extensive engineering craftmanship across multiple programming languages and modern frameworks, consistently demonstrating your strong track record in delivering high\-quality, outcome\-focused solutions. The ideal candidate will be a dependable team player, collaborating with cross\-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy advanced software solutions.

**Key Responsibilities****:**

**Outcome\-Driven Accountability:** Embrace and drive a culture of accountability for customer and business outcomes. Develop engineering solutions that solve complex problems with valuable outcomes, ensuring high\-quality, lean designs and implementations.


**Technical Leadership and Advocacy:** Serve as the technical advocate for products, ensuring code integrity, feasibility, and alignment with business and customer goals. Lead requirement analysis, component design, development, unit testing, integrations, and support.


**Engineering Craftsmanship:** Maintain accountability for the integrity of code design, implementation, quality, data, and ongoing maintenance and operations. Stay hands\-on, self\-driven, and continuously learn new approaches, languages, and frameworks. Create technical specifications, and write high\-quality, supportable, scalable code ensuring all quality KPIs are met or exceeded. Demonstrate collaborative skills to work effectively with diverse teams.

**Customer\-Centric Engineering:** Develop lean engineering solutions through rapid, inexpensive experimentation to solve customer needs. Engage with customers and product teams before, during, and after delivery to ensure the right solution is delivered at the right time.

**Incremental and Iterative Delivery:** Adopt a mindset that favors action and evidence over extensive planning. Utilize a learning\-forward approach to navigate complexity and uncertainty, delivering lean, supportable, and maintainable solutions.


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration and Integration:** Work collaboratively with empowered, cross\-functional teams including product management, experience, and delivery. Integrate diverse perspectives to make well\-informed decisions that balance feasibility, viability, usability, and value. Foster a collaborative environment that enhances team synergy and innovation.

**Advanced Technical Proficiency:** Possess deep expertise in modern software engineering practices and principles, including Agile methodologies and DevSecOps to deliver daily product deployments using full automation from code check\-in to production with all quality checks through SDLC lifecycle. Strive to be a role model, leveraging these techniques to optimize solutioning and product delivery. Demonstrate understanding of the full lifecycle product development, focusing on continuous improvement, and learning.

**Domain Expertise:** Quickly acquire domain\-specific knowledge relevant to the business or product. Translate business/user needs, architectures, and data designs into technical specifications and code. Be a valuable, flexible, and dedicated team member, supportive of teammates, and focused on quality and tech debt payoff.

**Effective Communication and Influence:** Exhibit exceptional communication skills, capable of articulating complex technical concepts clearly and compellingly. Inspire and influence teammates and product teams through well\-structured arguments and trade\-offs supported by evidence. Create coherent narratives that align technical solutions with business objectives.

**Engagement and Collaborative Co\-Creation:** Engage and collaborate with product engineering teams at all organizational levels, including customers as needed. Build and maintain constructive relationships, fostering a culture of co\-creation and shared momentum towards achieving product goals. Align diverse perspectives and drive consensus to create feasible solutions.

**The team****:** US Deloitte Technology Product Engineering has modernized software and product delivery, creating a scalable, cost\-effective model that focuses on value/outcomes that leverages a progressive and responsive talent structure. As Deloitte’s primary internal development team, Product Engineering delivers innovative digital solutions to businesses, service lines, and internal operations with proven bottom\-line results and outcomes. It helps power Deloitte’s success. It is the engine that drives Deloitte, serving many of the world’s largest, most respected companies. We develop and deploy cutting\-edge internal and go\-to\-market solutions that help Deloitte operate effectively and lead in the market. Our reputation is built on a tradition of delivering with excellence.

**Key Qualifications****:**


§ A bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related discipline. An advanced degree (e.g., MS) is preferred but not required. Experience is the most relevant factor.
§ Strong data engineering foundation with deep understanding of data\-structure, algorithms, code instrumentations, data warehousing, architecture etc.
§ 3\+ years proven experience with data ETL and ELT tools (such as ADF, SAP BODS, Glue, cloud\-native tools), data warehousing tools (such as SAP HANA) \- Mandatory
§ Experience with DataBricks, Data Factory and Python
§ 3\+ years of experience with cloud\-native engineering, using FaaS/PaaS/micro\-services on cloud hyper\-scalers like Azure, AWS, and GCP.
§ Strong understanding of methodologies \& tools like XP, Lean, SAFe, DevSecOps, SRE, ADO, GitHub, SonarQube, etc.
§ Reporting Tools \- Qlik or Tableau or Power BI
§ Strong preference will be given to candidates with experience in AI/ML and GenAI.
§ Excellent interpersonal and organizational skills, with the ability to handle diverse situations, complex projects, and changing priorities, behaving with passion, empathy, and care.**How You will Grow:** At Deloitte, our professional development plans focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day and excel in everything they do.

  


**Our purpose**  


Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.
**Our people and culture**  


Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.
**Professional development**  


At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state\-of\-the\-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India.
**Benefits to help you thrive**  


At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.
**Recruiting tips**  


From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

company: Stark digital media services pvt. ltd.
description:
### **Interested candidate can drop their CV at** **jobs@starkdigital.net** **or**
**Contact us on****\+91 7757063001**


  
**Senior Python Engineer**
  
**Job Description**
===================


We are Hiring a **Senior Python Engineer** for an On\-site Job.


**Designation\-** Senior Python Engineer (Web Scraping \& Automation Expert)


**Education\-** Any Graduation, Post Graduation


**Experience\-** 4 Yrs to 5 Yrs


**Location\-** Pune(Bavdhan)


**Interview Process\-** Google Meet


**Key Responsibilities:\-**  

1\. Design and implement an AI\-based system for web scraping, automated form filling, and code generation.  

2\. Develop automation scripts using Selenium or similar technologies that can autonomously traverse websites and handle multi\-page forms.  

3\. Integrate GenAI tools like OpenAI to enhance the automation process by intelligently generating, compiling, and debugging scripts.  

4\. Set up and maintain a repository for scripts, with nightly testing, validation, and automatic correction as needed.  

5\. Deploy automation builds using Docker or similar container technologies to ensure scalability and reliability.  

6\. Develop an asynchronous build queuing system that allows multiple users to initiate automation builds concurrently without bottlenecks.  

7\. Design monitoring, logging, and dashboard solutions to ensure 100% error\-free automation completion rates and maintain transparency.  

8\. Ensure scalability, stability, and performance optimization of the automation system.


**Preferred Skills:\-**  

– Experience with different RPA (Robotic Process Automation) tools.  

– Experience with cloud services like AWS, GCP, or Azure for deploying and managing automation workloads.  

– Familiarity with continuous testing frameworks, automated error detection, and self\-healing scripts.  

– Strong understanding of multi\-threading and concurrency.

title: AI / ML Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** AI / ML Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develops applications and systems that utilize AI tools, Cloud AI services, with proper cloud or on\-prem application pipeline with production ready quality. Be able to apply GenAI models as part of the solution. Could also include but not limited to deep learning, neural networks, chatbots, image processing.
  

**Must have skills :** Microsoft Agentic AI Architecture  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **12** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: As an AI / ML Engineer, you will engage in the development of applications and systems that leverage artificial intelligence tools and cloud AI services. Your typical day will involve designing and implementing production\-ready solutions, ensuring high\-quality application pipelines, and integrating generative AI models into various projects. You will also explore advanced techniques such as deep learning, neural networks, and image processing, contributing to innovative solutions that meet the needs of diverse stakeholders. The Data Architect is responsible for defining the application s data requirements and structure. This includes modeling and designing the application s data architecture, storage solutions, and integration approaches to ensure robust and scalable data management. Key Responsibilities \-Serve as a subject matter expert in Microsoft Agentic AI solutions, particularly with hands\-on experience in Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services including Large Language Models (LLMs) and Small Language Models (SLMs). \-Lead the design and architecture of multi\-agent systems, ensuring seamless integration into enterprise environments. \-Collaborate closely with engineering and product teams to deliver innovative GenAI and Agentic AI solutions that drive measurable business impact. \-Define and implement Responsible AI practices throughout the solution lifecycle, ensuring alignment with ethical standards and regulatory requirements. \-Mentor teams on best practices for agentic AI system design, orchestration, and deployment. \-Drive key architectural and technical decisions across diverse projects and teams. \-Facilitate knowledge\-sharing sessions and training focused on Microsoft s Agentic AI technology stack. \-Continuously assess solution performance and provide recommendations for optimization in scalability, accuracy, and compliance. Required Skills and Qualifications \-Must\-Have Skills: \-Extensive expertise in Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services. \-Strong knowledge of LLMs and SLMs, including fine\-tuning, deployment, and enterprise integration. \-Proven track record in designing and implementing agentic AI architectures. \-Practical experience with Python and Visual Studio Code. Good\-to\-Have Skills: \-Experience with Microsoft Azure Machine Learning. \-Familiarity with Microsoft Azure OpenAI Service. Additional Skills: \-In\-depth understanding of Responsible AI frameworks and governance policies. \-Ability to collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver scalable AI solutions. \-Knowledge of compliance and regulatory requirements in the AI domain. \-Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making skills. Experience and Education Requirements Minimum of 12 years of professional experience is required. At least 8 years of experience working with Microsoft AI technologies. A minimum of 2 years specializing in Agentic AI Architecture. 10\+ years of experience with Azure Platform as a Service (PAAS). 13\+ years of overall experience in the IT industry. 15 years of full\-time education is mandatory. As a Microsoft Agentic Architect, the role involves designing, architecting, and deploying advanced Agentic AI solutions within Microsoft s ecosystem. The primary focus is on building scalable multi\-agent systems and AI\-powered applications using tools such as Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services. The position demands a commitment to responsible development, ethical AI practices, and alignment with organizational objectives. Deep technical expertise, leadership, and cross\-functional collaboration are essential for driving innovation in agentic AI. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 12\+ years of experience in Microsoft Agentic AI Architecture. \- This position is based at our Bengaluru office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

description:

**Good to have skills :** Amazon Web Services (AWS)

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Job Summary We are seeking a Senior Analyst – Contact Center \& GenAI Operations with 3–5 years of experience in Contact Center technologies and AWS Cloud services. The ideal candidate will support the implementation, configuration, and day\-to\-day operation of Amazon Connect–based contact center solutions and GenAI\-powered chatbots, working under the guidance of senior engineers, team leads, and solution architects. This role is hands\-on and execution\-focused, involving development, integration, testing, and production support of cloud contact center and conversational AI solutions. Key Responsibilities Implementation \& Configuration Configure and support Amazon Connect contact center solutions across voice and digital channels (chat, voice). Implement and maintain AWS services including Amazon Lex, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, API Gateway, Transcribe, Comprehend, and Contact Lens. Assist in implementing GenAI\-powered chatbots and agent\-assist features using Amazon Bedrock and LLM\-based services as per defined designs. Configure Amazon Lex bots, intents, slots, and dialog flows, and integrate them with backend services or LLM\-based responses. Perform configuration changes, enhancements, and bug fixes in contact center and chatbot solutions. Development \& Integrations Develop and maintain Lambda functions and backend services using Node.js and/or Python. Support API\-based integrations with backend CRM, other enterprise systems. Assist with event\-driven integrations using Amazon Connect events, Lambda triggers, and Kinesis. Write clean, maintainable code and unit tests under guidance. Support \& Operations Provide L2 production support for contact center and chatbot applications, including incident handling and troubleshooting. Monitor system health using CloudWatch logs, metrics, and alarms. Assist in root cause analysis, defect resolution, and performance tuning. Support UAT, regression testing, and release validations. Required Skills \& Experience 3–5 years of experience in Contact Center technologies or cloud\-based customer experience platforms. Hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and supporting AWS services (Lex, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, API Gateway, Transcribe, Comprehend, Contact Lens). Exposure to GenAI concepts and LLM\-based solutions, including hands\-on or assisted experience with Amazon Bedrock. Experience configuring or supporting Amazon Lex chatbots. Programming experience in Node.js and/or Python. Basic understanding of REST APIs and system integrations. Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills. Preferred Qualifications Bachelor s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Information Technology. AWS certifications such as AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner or Developer – Associate. Exposure to Contact Lens analytics, call recordings, and sentiment analysis. Familiarity with CloudWatch, CloudTrail, and monitoring best practices. Experience supporting Omnichannel contact center solutions (voice and chat). Experience in enterprise support or managed services environments.

Roles \& Responsibilities: Lead AI\-driven solution design and delivery by applying GenAI and Agentic AI to address complex business challenges, automate processes, and integrate intelligent insights into enterprise workflows for measurable impact. Ability to align AI capabilities with business objectives while ensuring scalability, responsible use, and tangible value realization.

title: AI / ML Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** AI / ML Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develops applications and systems that utilize AI tools, Cloud AI services, with proper cloud or on\-prem application pipeline with production ready quality. Be able to apply GenAI models as part of the solution. Could also include but not limited to deep learning, neural networks, chatbots, image processing.
  

**Must have skills :** Microsoft Azure Machine Learning  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **12** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: The role of AI / ML Engineer focuses on the development of applications and systems that leverage artificial intelligence tools and Cloud AI services. This includes building robust application pipelines, either cloud\-based or on\-premises, that are production\-ready. The successful candidate will apply Generative AI models as part of the solution, with responsibilities potentially extending to deep learning, neural networks, chatbot development, and image processing. Key Requirements \-Must\-have Skills: Machine Learning expertise is essential. \-Good\-to\-have Skills: Familiarity with Microsoft Azure Machine Learning, React.js, and Python programming. \-Experience: Minimum of 10\+ years in relevant roles. \-Educational Qualification: BTECH degree required. Position Summary We are seeking a highly skilled Principal Engineer to lead the design and implementation of sophisticated AI and deep learning solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in Large Language Models (LLMs), cloud\-based AI deployment with Azure, and comprehensive full\-stack software development experience using .NET and Python. This individual will drive technical strategy, mentor engineering teams, and work closely with product and data science teams to deliver scalable, high\-performance AI systems addressing complex business challenges. Educational Qualifications \-Master s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. \-10\+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 5 years focused on AI/ML development. Technical Experience \& Professional Attributes \-Strong background in working with Large Language Models such as GPT and BERT, as well as deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch. \-Proficiency in Python and .NET (C\#) for the development of scalable AI solutions. \-Hands\-on experience utilizing Microsoft Azure AI services, including Azure ML, Cognitive Services, and AKS. \-Expertise in cloud\-native architectures, microservices, and container orchestration. \-Demonstrated ability to lead engineering teams and make crucial architecture decisions. \-Exceptional problem\-solving skills and the ability to deliver results in fast\-paced and ambiguous environments. \-Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written. Required Skills \-Experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP) libraries such as Hugging Face Transformers and spaCy. \-Familiarity with MLOps practices and tools, including model training pipelines, monitoring, and versioning. \-Understanding of distributed systems and data engineering principles. \-Experience with implementing CI/CD pipelines and DevOps automation. \-Contributions to AI\-related open\-source projects or relevant publications. Additional Information \-PhD or advanced research background in AI/ML or related fields is an advantage. \-You will be joining a Trusted Tax Technology Leader dedicated to delivering reliable and innovative solutions. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 10\+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Machine Learning. \- This position is based at our Hyderabad office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

title: Application Tech Support Practitioner
description:

**Project Role Description :** Act as the ongoing interface between the client and the system or application. Dedicated to quality, using exceptional communication skills to keep our world class systems running. Can accurately define a client issue and can interpret and design a resolution based on deep product knowledge.
  

**Must have skills :** Amazon Connect  

**Good to have skills :** Amazon Web Services (AWS)  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Job Summary We are seeking a Senior Analyst – Contact Center \& GenAI Operations with 3–5 years of experience in Contact Center technologies and AWS Cloud services. The ideal candidate will support the implementation, configuration, and day\-to\-day operation of Amazon Connect–based contact center solutions and GenAI\-powered chatbots, working under the guidance of senior engineers, team leads, and solution architects. This role is hands\-on and execution\-focused, involving development, integration, testing, and production support of cloud contact center and conversational AI solutions. Key Responsibilities Implementation \& Configuration Configure and support Amazon Connect contact center solutions across voice and digital channels (chat, voice). Implement and maintain AWS services including Amazon Lex, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, API Gateway, Transcribe, Comprehend, and Contact Lens. Assist in implementing GenAI\-powered chatbots and agent\-assist features using Amazon Bedrock and LLM\-based services as per defined designs. Configure Amazon Lex bots, intents, slots, and dialog flows, and integrate them with backend services or LLM\-based responses. Perform configuration changes, enhancements, and bug fixes in contact center and chatbot solutions. Development \& Integrations Develop and maintain Lambda functions and backend services using Node.js and/or Python. Support API\-based integrations with backend CRM, other enterprise systems. Assist with event\-driven integrations using Amazon Connect events, Lambda triggers, and Kinesis. Write clean, maintainable code and unit tests under guidance. Support \& Operations Provide L2 production support for contact center and chatbot applications, including incident handling and troubleshooting. Monitor system health using CloudWatch logs, metrics, and alarms. Assist in root cause analysis, defect resolution, and performance tuning. Support UAT, regression testing, and release validations. Required Skills \& Experience 3–5 years of experience in Contact Center technologies or cloud\-based customer experience platforms. Hands\-on experience with Amazon Connect and supporting AWS services (Lex, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, API Gateway, Transcribe, Comprehend, Contact Lens). Exposure to GenAI concepts and LLM\-based solutions, including hands\-on or assisted experience with Amazon Bedrock. Experience configuring or supporting Amazon Lex chatbots. Programming experience in Node.js and/or Python. Basic understanding of REST APIs and system integrations. Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills. Preferred Qualifications Bachelor s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or Information Technology. AWS certifications such as AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner or Developer – Associate. Exposure to Contact Lens analytics, call recordings, and sentiment analysis. Familiarity with CloudWatch, CloudTrail, and monitoring best practices. Experience supporting Omnichannel contact center solutions (voice and chat). Experience in enterprise support or managed services environments.
